# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: t:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/engine/dev_engine
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Where to install Skirmish AI additional files (eg. configuration)
AI_DATA_DIR:STRING=.

//Where to install Skirmish AI libraries
AI_LIBS_DIR:STRING=.

//Which AI Interfaces (and Skirmish AIs using them) to build [ALL|NATIVE|JAVA|NONE]
AI_TYPES:STRING=NONE

//Android JNI IOSystem support is active
ASSIMP_ANDROID_JNIIOSYSTEM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable AddressSanitizer.
ASSIMP_ASAN:BOOL=OFF

//Path the tool executables are installed to.
ASSIMP_BIN_INSTALL_DIR:STRING=bin

//build the 3DS importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_3DS_IMPORTER:STRING=ON

//build the 3D importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_3D_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the 3MF importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_3MF_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the AC importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_AC_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//default value of all ASSIMP_BUILD_XXX_IMPORTER value
ASSIMP_BUILD_ALL_IMPORTERS_BY_DEFAULT:BOOL=ON

//build the AMF importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_AMF_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//describe the current architecture.
ASSIMP_BUILD_ARCHITECTURE:STRING=

//build the ASE importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_ASE_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the ASSBIN importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_ASSBIN_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//If the supplementary tools for Assimp are built in addition to
// the library.
ASSIMP_BUILD_ASSIMP_TOOLS:STRING=OFF

//build the ASSXML importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_ASSXML_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the B3D importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_B3D_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the BLEND importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_BLEND_IMPORTER:STRING=ON

//build the BVH importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_BVH_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the COB importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_COB_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the COLLADA importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_COLLADA_IMPORTER:STRING=ON

//describe the current compiler.
ASSIMP_BUILD_COMPILER:STRING=

//build the CSM importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_CSM_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the DXF importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_DXF_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the FBX importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_FBX_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the GLTF importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_GLTF_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the HMP importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_HMP_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the IFC importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_IFC_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the IRRMESH importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_IRRMESH_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the IRR importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_IRR_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the LWS importer

//build the SIB importer

//build the SMD importer

//build the STL importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_STL_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the TERRAGEN importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_TERRAGEN_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the X3D importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_X3D_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the XGL importer
ASSIMP_BUILD_XGL_IMPORTER:STRING=OFF

//build the X importer

//Build your own zlib
ASSIMP_BUILD_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable this to measure test coverage.
ASSIMP_COVERALLS:BOOL=OFF

//Set to ON to enable double precision processing
ASSIMP_DOUBLE_PRECISION:STRING=OFF

//Path the header files are installed to.
ASSIMP_INCLUDE_INSTALL_DIR:STRING=include

//Install MSVC debug files.
ASSIMP_INSTALL_PDB:BOOL=ON

//Suffix to append to library names
ASSIMP_LIBRARY_SUFFIX:STRING=

//Path the built library files are installed to.
ASSIMP_LIB_INSTALL_DIR:STRING=lib

//Disable Assimp's export functionality.
ASSIMP_NO_EXPORT:STRING=ON

//Set to ON to generate CPack configuration files and packaging

ASSIMP_OPT_BUILD_PACKAGES:STRING=OFF

ASSIMP_PACKAGE_VERSION:STRING=0

//Enable Undefined Behavior sanitizer.
ASSIMP_UBSAN:BOOL=OFF

//Treat warnings as errors.
ASSIMP_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

Assimp_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/engine/dev_engine/rts/lib/assimp

Assimp_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/rts/lib/assimp

BUILD_BITS:STRING=64

//Build documentation using Doxygen.

//Configure the spring-headless target.
BUILD_spring-headless:BOOL=ON

//Configure the spring-legacy target.
BUILD_spring-legacy:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2019/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.29.30133/bin/Hostx64/x64/lib.exe

//ASM_MASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2019/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.29.30133/bin/Hostx64/x64/ml64.exe

//Flags used by the ASM_MASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM_MASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM_MASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM_MASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM_MASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_MASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Choose the type of build, options are: RELWITHDEBINFO DEBUG RELEASE
// PROFILE
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=RELWITHDEBINFO

//Semicolon separated list of supported configuration types, only
// supports Debug, Release, MinSizeRel, and RelWithDebInfo, anything
// else will be ignored.
CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES:STRING=Debug;Release;MinSizeRel;RelWithDebInfo

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=/DWINDOWS /D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS /wd4244 /wd4018 /wd4800 /wd4305 /wd4514 /wd4996 /wd4710 /wd4820 /DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /W3 /EHa /GR

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/D_DEBUG /MDd /Zi /Ob0 /Od /RTC1

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/MD /O1 /Ob1 /D NDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=/MD /O2 /Ob2 /D NDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/MD /Zi /O2 /Ob1 /D NDEBUG

//Libraries linked by default with all C++ applications.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=/DWINDOWS /D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS /wd4244 /wd4018 /wd4800 /wd4305 /wd4514 /wd4996 /wd4710 /wd4820 /DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /W3

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/D_DEBUG /MDd /Zi /Ob0 /Od /RTC1

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/MD /O1 /Ob1 /D NDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=/MD /O2 /Ob2 /D NDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/MD /Zi /O2 /Ob1 /D NDEBUG

//Libraries linked by default with all C applications.
CMAKE_C_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib

CMAKE_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=/machine:x64

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/debug /INCREMENTAL

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/INCREMENTAL:NO

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=/INCREMENTAL:NO

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/debug /INCREMENTAL

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Spring

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2019/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.29.30133/bin/Hostx64/x64/link.exe

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

COMPRESS_DEBUG_SYMBOLS:BOOL=OFF

INSTALL_PORTABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Where to install libraries
LIBDIR:STRING=.

LIBRARY_SUFFIX:STRING=-vc140-mt

//The minimum log level.
//\n		Log messages below this level
//\n		will not be compiled into the binary.
//\n		Available levels:
//\n		* DEFAULT (DEBUG on debug builds, INFO on release builds)
//\n		* DEBUG (log everything)
//\n		* INFO
//\n		* WARNING (only use this if you know what you are doing!)
LOG_LEVEL:STRING=DEFAULT

//Link Time Optimizations (LTO)
LTO:BOOL=OFF

//CPU optimization (use `generic` for generic optimization)
MARCH_FLAG:STRING=

MINGWLIBS:PATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64

MINIZIP_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=MINIZIP_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

MINIZIP_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=MINIZIP_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

NO_SOUND:BOOL=OFF

RT_DIR:PATH=RT_DIR-NOTFOUND

SYNCCHECK:BOOL=ON

//Enable sync debugger (needs SYNCCHECK=true)
SYNCDEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Use system installed Irrlicht/IrrXML library.
SYSTEM_IRRXML:BOOL=OFF

Spring_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring

//Path to a library.
TCMALLOC_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=TCMALLOC_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Enable ThreadPools
THREADPOOL:BOOL=ON

//Enable sync tracker
TRACE_SYNC:BOOL=OFF

//Enfore callstack collection for tracy regions
TRACY_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Enable delayed initialization of the library (init on first call)
TRACY_DELAYED_INIT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable profiling
TRACY_ENABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable fibers support
TRACY_FIBERS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the manual lifetime management of the profile
TRACY_MANUAL_LIFETIME:BOOL=OFF

//Disable client discovery by broadcast to local network
TRACY_NO_BROADCAST:BOOL=OFF

//Disable all callstack related functionality
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Disables the inline functions in callstacks
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK_INLINES:BOOL=OFF

//Disable collection of source code
TRACY_NO_CODE_TRANSFER:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of context switches
TRACY_NO_CONTEXT_SWITCH:BOOL=OFF

//Disable crash handling
TRACY_NO_CRASH_HANDLER:BOOL=OFF

//Client executable does not exit until all profile data is sent
// to server
TRACY_NO_EXIT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the frame image support and its thread
TRACY_NO_FRAME_IMAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Disable call stack sampling
TRACY_NO_SAMPLING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable systrace sampling
TRACY_NO_SYSTEM_TRACING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable zone validation for C API
TRACY_NO_VERIFY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of hardware Vsync events
TRACY_NO_VSYNC_CAPTURE:BOOL=OFF

//Tracy will only accept connections on IPv4 addresses (disable
// IPv6)
TRACY_ONLY_IPV4:BOOL=OFF

//Only listen on the localhost interface
TRACY_ONLY_LOCALHOST:BOOL=OFF

//On-demand profiling
TRACY_ON_DEMAND:BOOL=ON

//Profile memory allocations
TRACY_PROFILE_MEMORY:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy as a static library
TRACY_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Use lower resolution timers
TRACY_TIMER_FALLBACK:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/engine/dev_engine/rts/lib/tracy

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/rts/lib/tracy

//compile python bindings for unitsync (FIXME: broken with gcc
// 4.9 see #4377)
UNITSYNC_PYTHON_BINDINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Install HTML engine user-docs (README.html, LICENSE.html, etc.)
USERDOCS_HTML:BOOL=OFF

//Install plain/text engine user-docs (README, LICENSE, etc.)
USERDOCS_PLAIN:BOOL=OFF

//Build/link with address sanitizer enabled (for DEBUG builds only)
USE_ASAN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libsquish for DXT decompressing. (needed for ETC1 support)
USE_LIBSQUISH:BOOL=ON

//use tcmalloc (part of google's perftools)
USE_TCMALLOC:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
VALGRIND_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=VALGRIND_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
VORBISENC_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64/lib/libvorbis.lib

//Path to a library.
VORBISFILE_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64/lib/libvorbisfile.lib

//Path to a file.
VORBIS_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64/include

//Path to a library.
VORBIS_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64/lib/libvorbis.lib

//Path to a program.
Vulkan_GLSLANG_VALIDATOR_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=Vulkan_GLSLANG_VALIDATOR_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
Vulkan_GLSLC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=Vulkan_GLSLC_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
Vulkan_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=Vulkan_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

WARN_STATIC_LINK_SWITCH:BOOL=TRUE

//Include map compiler
WITH_MAPCOMPILER:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=T:/Kyle_Shepherd/games/Beyond-All-Reason/data/games/spring/vclibs64/include

//Path to a library.

//Path to a library.
